title: How It Works
description: UtilPlex tools run entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded, logged, or sent to a server.

sections.heading: Everything stays on your machine
sections.body: UtilPlex is a static site. Every formatter, converter, generator, and diff tool is implemented in JavaScript that runs in your browser tab. Your input never leaves your device — there is no API, no server-side processing, and no telemetry.

sections.heading: Pages load instantly
sections.body: Each page is pre-rendered HTML with a single CSS file and a small per-tool JavaScript bundle. We do not ship a framework runtime, so first paint is fast on slow connections and old hardware.

sections.heading: Open and inspectable
sections.body: The site is open source. View the page source, read the bundle, or audit the build script. There is no analytics, no third-party tracker, no ad network, and no cookies.

sections.heading: Built with
sections.body: Tailwind CSS for styling, Eta for templates, esbuild for tool bundles, and well-known libraries for the actual work — sql-formatter, prettier, js-yaml, js-beautify, and the diff package.
